"scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "In the country that popularised tipping, tipping is a way of life and more or less a social contract in The United States. Service staff get tips for everything! Waiters and service staff in general do not have guarantees of a reasonable minimum wage and many survive solely on tips to earn a livable wage. "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "In the country that popularised tipping, tipping is a way of life and more or less a social contract in The United States. Service staff get tips for everything! Waiters and service staff in general do not have guarantees of a reasonable minimum wage and many survive solely on tips to earn a livable wage. Whenever in doubt, always be prepared to tip 15% be it your spa therapist, hairdresser, tour guide or anyone who generally provides you a service as their way of making a living.", "resource-id": "com.handyapps.tipnsplit:id/description", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [274, 1279, 1415, 1336], "componentLabel": "Text"}], "componentLabel": "List Item"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.ViewGroup", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "class": "android.widget.RelativeLayout", "bounds": [0, 1396, 1440, 1712], "clickable": true, "children": [{"ancestors": ["android.widget.ImageView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "resource-id": "com.handyapps.tipnsplit:id/image", "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatImageView", "bounds": [25, 1431, 249, 1655], "componentLabel": "Image"}, {"text": "Australia", "resource-id": "com.handyapps.tipnsplit:id/title", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [274, 1433, 1415, 1518], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "No Tipping Required", "resource-id": "com.handyapps.tipnsplit:id/subtitle", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [274, 1518, 1415, 1584], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "Australia labor laws provide for a relatively generous minimum wage of AU$17.29 per hour, or AU$656.90 per week. This ensures that service staff such as hotel employees and waiters will get a reasonable quality of life based on the basic salaries that they earn working in those jobs.

In addition Australian workers enjoy a healthy dose of worklife balance! All employees are guaranteed 4 weeks of paid leave with every year of full-time employment!", "resource-id": "com.handyapps.tipnsplit:id/description", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [274, 1595, 1415, 1652], "componentLabel": "Text"}], "componentLabel": "List Item"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.ViewGroup", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "class": "android.widget.RelativeLayout", "bounds": [0, 1712, 1440, 2028], "clickable": true, "children": [{"ancestors": ["android.widget.ImageView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "resource-id": "com.handyapps.tipnsplit:id/image", "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatImageView", "bounds": [25, 1747, 249, 1971], "componentLabel": "Image"}, {"text": "The Bahamas", "resource-id": "com.handyapps.tipnsplit:id/title", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [274, 1749, 1415, 1834], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "No Tipping Required", "resource-id": "com.handyapps.tipnsplit:id/subtitle", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [274, 1834, 1415, 1900], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "A large majority of visitors to the Bahamas are from the United States so whenever you are unsure of a tipping practice, fall back to what you would do if you were in the United States. And you can always speak to a hotel concierge on the standard tipping practices in the Bahamas.", "resource-id": "com.handyapps.tipnsplit:id/description", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [274, 1911, 1415, 1968], "componentLabel": "Text"}], "componentLabel": "List Item"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.ViewGroup", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "class": "android.widget.RelativeLayout", "bounds": [0, 2028, 1440, 2344], "clickable": true, "children": [{"ancestors": ["android.widget.ImageView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "resource-id": "com.handyapps.tipnsplit:id/image", "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatImageView", "bounds": [25, 2063, 249, 2287], "componentLabel": "Image"}, {"text": "Canada", "resource-id": "com.handyapps.tipnsplit:id/title", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [274, 2065, 1415, 2150], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "Tipping Required", "resource-id": "com.handyapps.tipnsplit:id/subtitle", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [274, 2150, 1415, 2216], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "Canada has virtually identical tipping practices to the United States. However in Quebec, do note that servers in restaurants are taxed on their gross receipts each day. So if you don't tip your server in Quebec for a CAD$100 meal, he has to pay a tax out of his own pocket of CAD$8!", "resource-id": "com.handyapps.tipnsplit:id/description", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [274, 2227, 1415, 2284], "componentLabel": "Text"}], "componentLabel": "List Item"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.ViewGroup", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "class": "android.widget.RelativeLayout", "bounds": [0, 2344, 1440, 2392], "clickable": true, "children": [{"ancestors": ["android.widget.ImageView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "resource-id": "com.handyapps.tipnsplit:id/image", "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatImageView", "bounds": [25, 2379, 249, 2392], "componentLabel": "Image"}, {"text": "China", "resource-id": "com.handyapps.tipnsplit:id/title", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [274, 2381, 1415, 2392], "componentLabel": "Text"}], "componentLabel": "List Item"}]}
